title: Start Here
question: How should I use this self-guided information session?
summary: Begin with a quick overview of the site, then choose the modules most relevant to your questions.

title: Program Overview
question: What is CSPB, and why should I take it seriously?
summary: Learn how CSPB fits within CU Boulder, the College of Engineering, and the Department of Computer Science.

title: Is CSPB Right for Me?
question: Am I the kind of student this program is built for?
summary: See how the program serves degree-holding adults, career changers, upskillers, and students preparing for further study.

title: Career Outcomes
question: What kinds of roles and industries do CSPB alumni move into?
summary: Explore alumni role pathways, industry sectors, and career-support resources.

title: Curriculum
question: What courses will I take?
summary: Review required courses, electives, credit hours, and sample academic pathways.

title: What Online Classes Are Like
question: How does online learning work in CSPB?
summary: Learn about Canvas, asynchronous lectures, Piazza, online exams, office hours, and Mountain Time deadlines.

title: Student Support
question: What support will I have as an online CSPB student?
summary: Review advising, faculty office hours, career services, tutoring, networking, and peer interaction.

title: Admissions Requirements
question: What do I need to apply?
summary: Review degree prerequisites, GPA, math preparation, application materials, and deadlines.

title: Transfer Credit
question: Can previous coursework count toward the degree?
summary: Learn how transfer credit is evaluated and what limits apply.

title: Non-Degree Option
question: Can I take CSPB courses before applying to the degree program?
summary: Explore the non-degree option for trying courses, professional development, prerequisites, or GPA strengthening.

title: Tuition & Fees
question: What will the program cost?
summary: Review tuition and fee categories, with links to official current information.

title: Apply / Talk to Us
question: What should I do next?
summary: Apply, schedule an appointment, email the CSPB team, or attend a live information session.
